rationale: The one substantive ground-truth concern (yJader's point that already_submitted is irrelevant since both submit paths reject list prompts regardless) is directly and correctly reproduced by Y, which verified it by reading stage_pool.py's submit_initial/submit_update and confirmed the fix is exactly right — matching the reviewer's reasoning almost verbatim. X instead flags the same line but misreads it as a residual len>1 gap/possible crash, which Y shows is deliberate intended behavior, not a bug, so X's framing misses the actual insight and adds a partially incorrect speculative concern. X's other finding (verify ZImagePipeline return type) is explicitly unverified/hedged ('tool budget exhausted'), while Y verified the same code path against pipeline_z_image.py and confirmed the change is a strict improvement, giving Y much higher grounding and precision. X also emitted three duplicated review_text blocks, a formatting defect that doesn't help its case.
